Read the skill file `.ai/skills/integrate-upstream.md` first, then follow it step by step.

Help me integrate GPU Triton Kernels from an upstream library into the Triton-X repository.

Ask me:
1. Which library to integrate (e.g., `fla`, `liger-kernel`)
2. Which kernels to integrate (specific ones or all)
3. Target version/commit of the upstream repo
